clauses.obligation: 10-year initial term; successive 10-year renewals
Franchise fee, monthly royalty (6% GR), EDTA required, late fees (1.5%/mo)
Secure location within 45 days; 10-day approval; sign lease within 15 days; open within 300 days
Complete initial training to satisfaction; ongoing training up to 2 sessions/year at $500/person/day
Strict compliance; confidential; franchisor may modify without prior notice
Strict compliance with all standards, specifications, procedures
2% NAF (after 12 mo); local ad (max $2K/mo, 1.5%); grand opening $4K-$8K; internet restricted
Maintain records; monthly gross revenue reports; annual financial statements; 24-hour data access; unrestricted audit rights
Authorized products/services only; approved suppliers; appearance standards; Mon-Fri 7am-6pm; best efforts
Procure within 10 days of Effective Date; GL $1M/$2M; Business Property $50K+; A&M $1M; WC as required; A-rated carrier; franchisor as additional insured

22 enumerated grounds for immediate termination including: failure to open, failure to train, loss of licenses >5 days, material misrepresentation, felony, abandonment (5 days), unauthorized transfer, insolvency, cross-default, 3 breaches/12 months
Payment: 5-day cure; Insurance: 10-day cure; Other: 30-day cure
Cease operations; cease using marks/IP; cancel assumed names (30 days); pay all sums including loss of future royalties and attorneys' fees; return all materials; assign phone numbers
2 years, 25-mile radius of any WorldKids School or franchisor-owned business; no solicitation of customers/business associates
Franchisor may purchase business assets at book value within 30 days of termination/expiration
Prior written consent required; 13 conditions; $10,000 fee; transferee signs current FA; general release; noncompete by seller; complete training
Franchisor may match any bona fide offer for business or ownership interest
Representative must transfer within 180 days; franchisor may manage at $500/person/day during interim
Unlimited personal guaranty by all 5%+ equity owners. Guarantors personally liable for ALL obligations.
Franchisee indemnifies franchisor for all claims arising from outlet operations
WA law; WA forum; mandatory mediation then arbitration; jury waiver; class action waiver; no punitive damages; prior notice of claims; prevailing party attorneys' fees
Neither party liable for failure due to force majeure events
Trade secrets and confidential information must remain confidential during and after term; NDAs required for personnel
All ideas/developments related to business become franchisor's property; must assist with IP rights
Owners, officers, directors, managers, employees may be required to sign NDA/noncompete

distinctive_clauses.clause: Loss of future royalties on termination
distinctive_clauses.note: Post-termination payment obligation includes 'loss of future Royalty Fee payments incurred by Franchisor as a result of any early termination' — this is a liquidated damages-type provision
Immediate termination for marketing outside territory — even if target area is not another franchisee's territory
Must refer business opportunities from other territories — failure is non-curable default

distinctive_clauses.clause: Franchisor right to operate after default notice
distinctive_clauses.note: Franchisor may take over operations after sending cure notice at $500/person/day
Franchisor can purchase assets at book value (not fair market value) within 30 days of termination/expiration — subject to applicable state law
